title: ADSearch
description: Complete quick-reference cheatsheet for ADSearch.exe covering connection modes, built-in enumeration shortcuts, custom LDAP queries for delegation/kerberoasting/AS-REP roasting/privileged accounts, output formatting flags, and execute-assembly one-liners for OSEP and real-world Active Directory engagements.

title: Overwatch HTB
description: Windows Active Directory machine exploited via SMB reverse engineering, ADIDNS poisoning to capture cleartext MSSQL credentials, and SOAP command injection for SYSTEM.
